services.title: What we clean
services.subtitle: Full range of home & automotive textile cleaning

items.name: Sofas & Armchairs
items.description: Deep upholstery cleaning, stain removal, dust mites and bacteria elimination. All fabric types.

items.name: Mattresses
items.description: Deep disinfection and dust mite removal. Essential for healthy sleep.

items.name: Carpets & Rugs
items.description: Injection-extraction for all types of carpets and rugs. Quick drying.

items.name: Curtains

items.name: Car Seats
items.description: Deep cleaning of automotive textiles, upholstery, mats and headliner.

technology.title: Injection-Extraction
technology.subtitle: Three steps — one visible result
technology.description: Unlike traditional surface cleaning, injection-extraction technology penetrates directly into the fabric — injecting water mixed with cleaning solution, then immediately extracting it along with all the dirt. The fabric is left barely damp and dries in hours.

steps.title: Injection
steps.description: Water mixed with the right cleaning solution is sprayed under pressure directly into the fabric — reaching deep into the fibres where dirt hides.

steps.title: Product action
steps.description: The specialised cleaning solution breaks down stains, bacteria, dust mites and allergens. Product choice depends on the fabric type and level of soiling.

steps.title: Extraction
steps.description: The machine immediately suctions back the water along with all the broken-down dirt. The fabric stays barely damp — no risk of mould.

features.title: Deep into the fibres
features.description: We reach dirt that surface cleaning simply cannot remove.

features.title: Right product for each fabric
features.description: We select the product based on the material — safe for children and pets.

features.title: Dries in 2–4 hours
features.description: Minimal water, maximum result. Furniture ready to use the same day.

features.title: Visible result from the 1st clean
features.description: No guessing whether it worked — the difference is immediately visible.

items.title: We come to you

items.title: Results or no charge

pricing.title: Price list
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Final price depends on size and level of soiling.
pricing.note: * Payment accepted in EUR and BGN. Payment is due after the service.

items.q: Do I need to move the furniture?
items.a: Absolutely not! We come with everything needed and clean on-site. We only ask you to clear a little space around the furniture.

items.q: How long does it take to dry?
items.a: With injection-extraction, fabric dries in 2–4 hours — much faster than traditional wet cleaning. You can use your furniture the same day.

items.q: Is it safe for children and pets?
items.a: Yes. We only use certified, biodegradable products. Once dry, they leave no harmful residues.
In most cases — yes. Injection-extraction is very effective even on stubborn stains. With prior information about the stain type, we can assess the chance of full removal.

items.q: How much does it cost and how do I pay?
items.a: Prices depend on type and size. All prices are transparent — no hidden fees. Payment is in cash or bank transfer after the service.
We cover Bansko, Razlog, Dobrinishte, Belitsa and the entire Bansko-Razlog valley. For more distant locations — contact us.
